dragDropArea.mainMessage: Drag and drop any <u>video</u> or <u>audio</u> files here!
dragDropArea.subMessage: You can drop MKV files and subtitle files(vtt, srt, smi) too.
dragDropArea.urlLabel: Or paste a direct media link
dragDropArea.invalidMediaUrl: Enter a valid direct audio or video URL.
dragDropArea.neverStoreYourData: We never store your files on our server.
